basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially announced the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published on 15 May 2026 at NIT Calicut Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per the official notification and hold a Ph.D. with consistently good academic record can now submit their online applications from 15 May 2026 to 15 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with consistently good academic record
qualification.details: Assistant Professor Grade II (On Contract): Ph.D. with consistently good academic record. Assistant Professor Grade I: Ph.D. with consistently good academic record and 03 years after Ph.D. or 06 years total teaching and research experience in reputed academic Institute / R&D labs / relevant industry.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor Grade II (On Contract): Pay Level-10 Assistant Professor Grade I: Pay Level-12

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
